response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and deep exposure to cloud platforms and agentic workflows, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI systems, vector databases, or RAG architectures, and his AI experience is embedded within broader full-stack roles rather than focused AI delivery.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Extensive cloud and full-stack development using TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS
Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years dedicated to production-grade AI solutions
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architecture
Limited documentation of LLM optimization, multi-agent frameworks (e.g., LangGraph), or AI evaluation pipelines

key_factors.factor: Lack of verified RAG/vector DB experience
